title: Turtle Beach’s new Xbox flight stick puts a full color screen under your thumb.
summary: The new $149.99 VelocityOne Flightstick II upgrades the original with a new full color screen at the top of the joystick, 38 mappable inputs, and Hall effect sensors. If you buy something from a Verge link, Vox Media may earn a commission.
